agribalyse.name_en: Muesli, crunchy, with chocolate, with or without fruits, fortified with vitamins and chemical elements

ingredients_text: Whole grains (rolled oats, brown rice flakes, ragi flakes) 47%, dried fruits  (cranberries, black & golden raisins, dates) 17%,  cocoa  (cocoa nibs, cocoa butter, cocoa powder) 13%, kakvi 13%,  seeds(pumpkin & watermelon seeds) 4%,   whole milk powder 3%,  almonds. 3%
